meta.title: AURELIA Pro X1 — Espresso, sculpted.
meta.description: Compact premium espresso machine. Made in Italy.

inquiry.title: Request a tailored quote
inquiry.subtitle: Our sales lead will get back to you within 24 hours to configure the ideal setup.
inquiry.mailFooter: Sent from the AURELIA Pro X1 trade-show kiosk.

display.title: 3.5″ TFT display
display.description: Capacitive color screen at 480×320 px. Shows boiler temperature, extraction pressure, shot timer and custom profiles. Bilingual interface available.

gauge.title: Premium analog gauge
gauge.description: Boiler pressure gauge with burnished copper-finish dial and solid copper bezel. Precision indicator needle. Anti-scratch tempered glass.

controls.title: Backlit capacitive controls
controls.description: Three capacitive buttons: power, group illumination and manual selection. Under-glass tactile response, adjustable white backlighting, IP54 rated.

group.title: Group head with copper collar
group.description: Custom 58 mm group head with iconic burnished copper collar. Stainless-steel diffuser, automatic pre-infusion, thermal stability guaranteed by the thermoblock.

portafilter.title: 58 mm portafilter with walnut handle
portafilter.description: Polished chrome 58 mm bottomless portafilter. Hand-crafted Italian walnut handle with satin oil finish. Twin-spout chromed beak.

steam.title: Articulated copper steam wand
steam.description: Burnished copper steam pipe with ergonomic S-curve. 360° articulated joint protected by cool-touch gasket. Chromed tip with four holes for championship-grade microfoam.

warmer.title: Steel cup warmer top
warmer.description: Top surface in 304 stainless-steel mesh. Passively heated by the thermoblock. Holds up to 6 pre-warmed espresso cups.

drip.title: Drip tray with steel grate
drip.description: Removable reinforced matte ABS basin with stainless-steel top grate. Chevron pattern optimises drainage and ease of cleaning.

footer.disclaimer: Actual product dimensions and features may vary. Prices subject to change.
